scope.goal: Apply the non-behavioral documentation cleanup decisions from the #654 semantic-kernel capability audit.
non_goals: Do not rewrite historical checked artifacts.
Do not rename runtime report labels in product code.
Do not open exact semantic admission.
Do not add public semantic-kernel APIs.

canonical_shared_obligation_labels.policy: New docs and reports should use the canonical shared await protocol label. Historical artifacts remain readable.
New docs and reports should use the canonical shared async-function protocol label. Promise producer-return proof remains a separate JS/TS producer diagnostic.
New docs and reports should use the canonical shared async-block protocol label. Historical Rust Future wording remains readable.

compatibility_aliases_preserved: EvidenceEmitter::FirstParty Rust associated const and Builtin serde alias

feature_shaped_promise_diagnostics.label: promise-constructor-receiver-producer-proof
feature_shaped_promise_diagnostics.documented_as: missing Promise producer/channel proof, not constructor feature support

feature_shaped_promise_diagnostics.label: promise-async-function-return-producer-proof
feature_shaped_promise_diagnostics.documented_as: JS/TS Promise producer proof, not the shared async-function scheduling label

feature_shaped_promise_diagnostics.label: promise-then-promise-like-receiver-proof
feature_shaped_promise_diagnostics.documented_as: FutureLike receiver proof for continuation admission

duplicate_or_grouping_decisions.decision: Group under call-target producer proof while preserving distinct diagnostics.
Group under imported settled-value channel proof while preserving distinct diagnostics.
Group as continuation channel obligations while preserving channel-specific subreasons.

validation_commands: jq -e '.summary.docs_or_changelog_paths_touched == (.docs_or_changelog_paths_touched | length) and .summary.canonical_shared_obligation_labels_documented == (.canonical_shared_obligation_labels | length) and .summary.compatibility_aliases_preserved == (.compatibility_aliases_preserved | length) and .summary.feature_shaped_promise_diagnostics_documented == (.feature_shaped_promise_diagnostics | length) and .summary.duplicate_or_grouping_decisions_documented == (.duplicate_or_grouping_decisions | length) and .hard_gate.historical_artifacts_rewritten == 0 and .hard_gate.public_api_expansion == 0 and .hard_gate.semantic_admission_delta == 0' bench/recall_loss/issue-656-obligation-label-docs-cleanup-2026-07-02.v1.json
